recommendations.title: The Nine Lives of Christmas
recommendations.overview: With Christmas approaching, a handsome fireman afraid of commitment adopts a stray cat and meets a beautiful veterinary student who challenges his decision to remain a confirmed bachelor.

recommendations.title: Wildcats
recommendations.overview: High school track coach Molly McGrath knows just as much about football as anyone else on the planet. When a football coach's position becomes vacant, she applies for the job, despite snickers from fellow staff members and her former husband.

recommendations.title: Mozart and the Whale
recommendations.overview: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism, whose conditions sabotage their budding relationship.

recommendations.title: The Road Within
recommendations.overview: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.

recommendations.title: Front of the Class
recommendations.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

recommendations.title: Family Swap
recommendations.overview: Husband does not understand his wife? Conflict with children? Do you want to be heard and stood in your place? Be afraid of your desires. In this family, everything changed places, including grandmother.

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: Home Team
recommendations.overview: Two years after a Super Bowl win when NFL head coach Sean Payton is suspended, he goes back to his hometown and finds himself reconnecting with his 12-year-old son by coaching his Pop Warner football team.
